other_observers: Duane Nelson, Joe Roller, John Drummond.; us
description: I heard some Sandhill Cranes flying over at Nee Grande Reservoir, and looked at them and saw an adult Whooping Crane with them. The bird was larger than the nearby Sandhill Cranes in flight. The bird had a white neck, white wings, with a lot of black on the wing tips. The underparts were white, with darkish legs trailing behind the tail. The bird was seen for a few minutes, it the flock went out of sight.Behaviors: Flying with a flock of Sandhill Cranes.Call: nonePlumage: adult
